fields.helpText: The Cluster ID is an assigned number that provides a unique identifier for  the grouping of procedures.

The MDC classification of a Procedure, either Operating Room or  Non-Operating Room.  All Procedures are identified as either Operating  Room or Non-Operating Room procedures.      In this case the cluster acts as a single Procedure, given that all the  cluster procedures are assigned to the record.

Cluster Type identifies the original structure of the cluster.  The  standard type is a simple list of procedures included in the cluster.   The Type identified as 'ONE OF WITH' were originally structured as two  list, the first was 'One of' the second list was 'with'.  These were  expanded from two lists to the standard structure with a cluster for each  combined list.
The list of all Procedures that define a Cluster.  These will act as a  single Procedure within the DRG calculations.
